        com.ido.ble.bluetooth.a.g(com.ido.ble.common.k.a(bindAuth));
        int iA = d.a(bindAuth);
        if (com.veryfit.multi.nativeprotocol.a.SUCCESS != com.veryfit.multi.nativeprotocol.a.a(iA)) {
            LogTool.d(com.ido.ble.logs.a.f4633a, "[BIND_UNBIND] bind failed! so check error. error =" + iA);
            com.ido.ble.event.stat.one.c.a("error:" + iA);
            BindCallBack.b();
        }
    }

            quickSportMode.sport_type2_basketball = true;
            quickSportMode.sport_type0_on_foot = true;
            quickSportMode.sport_type0_badminton = true;

        }
        return quickSportMode;
    }

/* JADX INFO: loaded from: classes2.dex */
public class BloodPressureAdjustDeviceReplyInfo {
    private static final int FLAG_BUSY = 3;
    private static final int FLAG_FAIL = 6;
    private static final int FLAG_ING = 1;
    private static final int FLAG_INVALID = 4;
    private static final int FLAG_SPORT_MODE = 2;
    private static final int FLAG_SUCCESS = 0;
    public int ret_code;

    public enum BloodAdjustResult {
        SUCCESS,
        ADJUST_ING,
        DEVICE_IN_SPORT_MODE,
        DEVICE_BUSY,
        STATUS_INVALID,
        FAILED
    }

    public BloodAdjustResult toResult() {
        int i = this.ret_code;
        if (i == 0) {
            return BloodAdjustResult.SUCCESS;
        }
        if (i == 1) {
            return BloodAdjustResult.ADJUST_ING;
        }
        if (i == 2) {
            return BloodAdjustResult.DEVICE_IN_SPORT_MODE;
        }
        if (i == 3) {
            return BloodAdjustResult.DEVICE_BUSY;
        }
        if (i != 4 && i == 6) {
            return BloodAdjustResult.FAILED;
        }
        return BloodAdjustResult.STATUS_INVALID;
    }
}

                i |= 1 << (i2 + 1);
            }
        }
        return z ? i | 1 : i;

package com.ido.ble.protocol.model;

import java.io.Serializable;
import java.util.Arrays;

/* JADX INFO: loaded from: classes2.dex */
public class WalkReminder implements Serializable {
    public static final int OFF = 0;
    public static final int ON = 1;
    private static final long serialVersionUID = 1;
    private int endHour;
    private int endMinute;
    private int goalStep;
    private int goalTime;
    private int notifyFlag;
    private int repeat;
    private int startHour;
    private int startMinute;
    private int onOff = 0;
    private boolean[] weeks = new boolean[7];

    private void byteToWeekRepeat() {
        this.weeks = new boolean[7];
        int i = 0;
        while (i < 7) {
            int i2 = i + 1;
            if ((this.repeat & (1 << i2)) != 0) {
                this.weeks[i] = true;
            } else {
                this.weeks[i] = false;
            }

        return i > 160 && i < 200;

        return i > 250 && i < 290;
    }
